title: fix(deps): update module github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface to v0.6.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface) | require | minor | `v0.5.4` -> `v0.6.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface (github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.6.0`](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.6.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.5.4...v0.6.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Remove API from pkg by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/107](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/107)
-   Fix readme by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/109](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/109)
-   Add a vendor make target for updating go module files by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/108](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/108)
-   Update dependencies by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/114](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/114)
-   Added Annotations to CDI Spec by [@​zvonkok](https://togithub.com/zvonkok) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/85](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/85)
-   Create dependabot.yml by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/116](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/116)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.0 to 1.8.2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/121](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/121)
-   build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 2 to 3 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/118](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/118)
-   build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 2 to 3 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/117](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/117)
-   Removed release-note-none label from dependabot by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/125](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/125)
-   Prepend yaml separator (---) to yaml output by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/126](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/126)
-   Add required dependency-name field to dependabot config by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/129](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/129)
-   Move parsing and name validation to cdi/parse package by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/130](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/130)
-   build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 3 to 4 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/128](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/128)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec from 1.0.3-0.20220825212826-86290f6a00fb to 1.1.0-rc.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/123](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/123)
-   readme: fix typo in cdi example by [@​moshe010](https://togithub.com/moshe010) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/135](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/135)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.1.2 to 1.1.5 in /cmd/cdi by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/134](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/134)
-   Support dots in Kind name segment by [@​adrianchiris](https://togithub.com/adrianchiris) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/137](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/137)
-   codespell: workflow, config, typos fixed by [@​yarikoptic](https://togithub.com/yarikoptic) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/139](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/139)
-   build(deps): bump codespell-project/actions-codespell from 1 to 2 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/141](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/141)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​zvonkok](https://togithub.com/zvonkok) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/85](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/85)
-   [@​adrianchiris](https://togithub.com/adrianchiris) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/137](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/137)
-   [@​yarikoptic](https://togithub.com/yarikoptic) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/139](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/pull/139)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.5.4...v0.6.0

</details>
